category_title: Students with radical mood swings and unpredictable task engagement
scenario_title: Destruction of creative art work after a long process
minimal_context: The student and tutor are reviewing a creative art work project they have been working on for a long time in the psychiatric department.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We have been working on this creative art work through a long process. Let's continue working on it today.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't want to. My willingness to cooperate and my motivation levels rise and fall, and today I just don't want to do it.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What do you think you should do next?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Nothing. Being hospitalized in a psychiatric department creates an uneasy feeling of being non-normative. This art doesn't change that.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just try to look at the art work on the table.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Grabs the art work) I'm in a bad mood today. I'm throwing it away!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: We have been working on this creative art work through a long process. Let's continue working on it today.

STUDENT: I don't want to. My willingness to cooperate and my motivation levels rise and fall, and today I just don't want to do it.

TUTOR: What do you think you should do next?

STUDENT: Nothing. Being hospitalized in a psychiatric department creates an uneasy feeling of being non-normative. This art doesn't change that.

TUTOR: Just try to look at the art work on the table.

STUDENT: (Grabs the art work) I'm in a bad mood today. I'm throwing it away!

task.content: long process of creative art work
task.learning_goal: create a feeling of being normative

context.materials: creative art work, behavioral program with points and prizes
context.social_setting: teacher has helped the student through a long process

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: after the teacher has helped the student through a long process of creative art work
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: student abruptly decides to throw it away
related_quotes: after which the student abruptly decides to throw it away

behavior_patterns.condition: due to frequent and radical mood swings
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: abruptly decides to throw it away
behavior_patterns.internal_state: moods and motivation levels rise and fall
related_quotes: abruptly decides to throw it away
